executive.headline: Mortgage rates: watch for continued pressure

alerts.title: Inflation pressure rising
alerts.why_it_matters: Persistent inflation can keep rates higher for longer and pressure margins.

deep_analysis.what_changed: Mortgage rate delta: -0.03 pts • CPI delta: +0.56 • Unemployment delta: -0.10 pts
what_to_do_next: Monitor financing conditions and bid discipline on long-duration projects.
Watch CPI trend for rate path implications.
Prioritize backlog quality and renegotiate risk clauses where possible.
